findings.issue: Capitalisation artefact: 'Decimal number' — 'number' should be lowercase; 'Decimal' is mid-sentence capitalisation inconsistency.
findings.current: expressed in Decimal number separated by "." every 8 bits
findings.expected: expressed in decimal notation separated by "." every 8 bits

findings.issue: NAT definition on p493 describes only the private→global direction ('converts private IP addresses into global IP addresses'). The p495 entry correctly says '相互変換' (mutual conversion). Inconsistency; p493 is incomplete.
findings.current_jp: プライベートIPアドレスをグローバルIPアドレスへ変換する技術
findings.expected_jp: プライベートIPアドレスとグローバルIPアドレスを相互変換する技術

findings.issue: Cloud Computing defined solely as 'the conventional method where servers are far from users, resulting in slow communication.' This is misleading — it frames Cloud Computing as a negative legacy approach rather than as a paradigm for on-demand, scalable, remote-server computing. Learners would be left with a fundamentally distorted concept.
findings.current_jp: サーバはユーザーから離れた場所にあるので通信に時間がかかっていた従来の方式。
findings.current_zh: 传统方式中，服务器位于远离用户的位置，因此通信耗时较长。
findings.current_en: The conventional method in which servers are located far from users, resulting in time-consuming communication.
findings.expected: A computing model that delivers on-demand IT resources (servers, storage, software) over the Internet. Servers are located remotely; contrast with Edge Computing where servers are placed near IoT devices to reduce latency.

findings.issue: Table 'Email Recipient Field' (p496) has rows with only 1 cell each (no description/explanation column). Table on p497 correctly has 2 columns (Name + Explanation). p496 table is structurally incomplete — missing the description column entirely.
findings.expected: rows should have 2 cells per row matching the p497 full table

findings.issue: JP-kanji contamination in ZH: table cell uses '格安手机' — '格安' is a Japanese-only compound (meaning cheap/budget) that has no standard ZH usage. The standalone term entity on the same page correctly uses '廉价智能手机'. The table cell is inconsistent and contains a JP loanword in the ZH field.
findings.current_zh: 在日本俗称"格安手机"等
findings.expected_zh: 在日本通常被称为"廉价智能手机"等

findings.issue: Punctuation inconsistency in ZH: definition uses ASCII comma ',' three times instead of Chinese fullwidth comma '，'. Also uses ASCII period inside the sentence. Mixed half-width/full-width punctuation in ZH text.
findings.current_zh: 在不让其他收件人知道的情况下,填写共享电子邮件的对方的栏目。一般填入互不相识的多个人（如客户等）。此栏目中填入的收件人地址,除发件人以外都无法查看。
findings.expected_zh: 在不让其他收件人知道的情况下，填写共享电子邮件的对方的栏目。一般填入互不相识的多个人（如客户等）。此栏目中填入的收件人地址，除发件人以外都无法查看。

findings.issue: Section number collision: p496, p497 use section_number '14-05' with title 'インターネットサービス', and p499 also uses '14-05' with a different title '通信サービス'. Same section number assigned to two distinct section titles.
findings.current: p499 section_number=14-05, title=通信サービス
findings.context: p496/p497 also section_number=14-05 but title=インターネットサービス

findings.issue: ASCII comma ',' used instead of Chinese fullwidth comma '，' in ZH table cell: '租用其他公司的无线通信基础设施,向客户提供'. Same issue as F06 but in a different entity.
findings.current_zh: 租用其他公司的无线通信基础设施,向客户提供 SIM 卡...
findings.expected_zh: 租用其他公司的无线通信基础设施，向客户提供 SIM 卡...

summary: 8 findings: 2 MAJOR, 6 MINOR. 0 U+FFFD, 0 sentence-as-term. MAJOR issues: (F03) Cloud Computing defined as purely 'old slow method' — semantically misleading; (F05) JP-kanji contamination in ZH — '格安手机' in MVNO table cell (格安 is JP-only). MINOR issues: (F01) capitalisation artefact in IPv4 EN def; (F02) NAT p493 one-directional definition inconsistent with p495; (F04) p496 email table missing description column; (F06/F08) ASCII commas in ZH text (Bcc term p497, MVNO table p499); (F07) section_number 14-05 collision across two different section titles. Page 497 stage6_verdict=WARN acknowledged (polish_items_ref present). No safety/security confusion, no duplicate markers of concern, no U+FFFD.
